MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS PAUL ALLEN, RONNY BIIJ, CASEY BUMBALES, STEPHEN CECRLE, DOLORES CLARK, JAMES EDWARDS, ALFRED FALLS, FRANCISCO JOSEPHSON, GEORGE MILLIKEN, JEFFREY ROBBINS, MICHAEL SIPLIN, MARK SUBER, STANLEY WILLIAMS' MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application of Elizabeth M. Wilkins to appear as counsel pro hac vice to plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
